main-translation: And God *created from nothing* the *massive* sea creatures and every teeming living soul which *vibrantly* moves, with which the waters swarmed according to their own *fixed* kind, and every winged bird according to its *fixed* kind; and God *forensically* inspected the result, *observing* that it was *perfectly functional and* good.
And God *legally* empowered them, *decreeing*: "Be abundantly fruitful and *continually* multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let the birds *continually* multiply across the earth."
And there was evening *transition* and there was morning *transition*—the fifth *unique* day.

And God *legally* commanded, "Let the earth *vibrantly* bring forth teeming living souls, each according to its own *fixed* kind: the *domesticated* cattle, and the *small* creeping things, and the *wild* beasts of the earth, each according to its *fixed* kind!" and it was *immediately and perfectly* so.

And God *specifically* fashioned the wild beasts of the earth according to their own *fixed* kind, and the cattle according to their *fixed* kind, and every creeping thing of the ground according to its *fixed* kind; and God *forensically* inspected the result, *observing* that it was *perfectly functional and* good.

And God *legally* deliberated, "Let Us make Mankind in Our *representative* image, according to Our *functional* likeness; and let them *legally* exercise dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the birds of the heavens, and over the cattle, and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that *vibrantly* moves upon the earth."
And God *created from nothing* Mankind in His own *representative* image; in the *representative* image of God He *specifically* created him; male and female He *specifically* created them.

And God *legally* empowered them, and God *legally* commanded them, "Be abundantly fruitful and *continually* multiply, and fill the earth and *legally* bring it into subjection; and *legally* exercise dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the birds of the heavens, and over every living thing that *vibrantly* moves upon the earth!"

And God *legally* declared, "Look and pay attention! I have *hereby* granted to you legal title to every seed-bearing herb which is upon the faces of all the earth, and every tree which has seed-bearing fruit; to you it shall be for *lawful* food."

And to every beast of the earth, and to every bird of the heavens, and to every creeping thing upon the earth in which there is a living soul, I have *hereby* granted every green herb for food; and it was *immediately and perfectly* so.

And God *forensically* inspected everything which He had *specifically* fashioned, and behold, it was *functionally perfect in every dimension and* exceedingly good! And there was evening *transition* and there was morning *transition*—the sixth *unique* day.
And the heavens and the earth, and all their *massive* array, were *once-for-all perfectly* finished.

And by the seventh day, God had *perfectly* finished His *sovereign* work which He had *specifically* fashioned; and He *legally* desisted on the seventh day from all His *creative* labor which He had *specifically* fashioned.

And God *legally* empowered the seventh day and *legally* set it apart as holy, because in it He *formally* desisted from all His work which God had *specifically* created from nothing in order to fashion it.

These *specifically* are the *forensic* histories of the heavens and the earth when they were *specifically* created, in the day that Yahweh God *the Self-Existent Sovereign Creator* *specifically* fashioned the earth and the heavens.

And every plant of the field was not yet in the earth, and every herb of the field had not yet *vibrantly* sprouted, because Yahweh God had not yet *specifically* caused rain upon the earth, and there was no specific human agent to *forensically* cultivate the ground.
But a *moist* mist *continually* went up from the earth and *perpetually* watered the entire faces of the ground.
And Yahweh God *specifically* formed the man *using* dust from the ground, and *Sovereignly* breathed into his nostrils the *absolute* breath of life; and the man became a *teeming* living soul.
And Yahweh God *specifically* planted a *protected* garden in Eden, toward the east; and there He *legally* placed the man whom He had *specifically* formed.

And Yahweh God caused to *vibrantly* grow from the ground every tree that is *aesthetically* desirable to the sight and *perfectly* good for food; with the Tree of Life in the middle of the garden, and the Tree of the *forensic* Knowledge of Good and Evil.
